source: #### Use this notebook to alter HashKey and HashDiffs and have it also reflected in currently loaded data.

table_name = "nem12_bronze" # Set default to bronze table
db_name = "aemo_bronze"
destination_container = "bronze"
destination_storage = "cqldevdatahubsynapse"
destination_path = "AEMO/NEM12" # Default, please change as require

path = f'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{table_name}' # Location of parquet files once we write the changes

# Loading data from table
df = spark.read.table(f"{db_name}.{table_name}")

# Columns included for new HashDiff
# Please fill this in with the column names from the table that need to be included for hash key and hash diff
COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_KEY = []
COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF = ['NMI','RegisterID','NMIConfiguration','IntervalLength','UnitOfMeasurementId','Timestamp','IntervalDate','VersionHeader','FromParticipant','ToParticipant','NMISuffix','MDMDataStreamIdentifier','MeterSerialNumber','NextScheduledReadDate','FinalQualityMethodId','FinalReasonCodeId','MSATSLoadDateTime','QualityMethodId','ReasonCodeId','TransCodeId','RetServiceOrder','ReadDatetime','IndexRead','FileName']

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

assert len(COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF) > 0 or len(COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_KEY) > 0

if len(COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_KEY) > 0:
    df = df.withColumn("NewHashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||",*COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_KEY),256))
    df = df.withColumn("OldHashKey",col("Nem12HashKey")) # Creating a backup to test changes
    df = df.withColumn("Nem12HashKey",col("NewHashKey")) # Replacing HashDiff column with new HashDiff values

if len(COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF) > 0:
    df = df.withColumn("NewHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||",*COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF),256))
    df = df.withColumn("OldHashDiff",col("Nem12HashDiff")) # Creating a backup to test changes
    df = df.withColumn("Nem12HashDiff",col("NewHashDiff")) # Replacing HashDiff column with new HashDiff values

# Cleanup Unnecessary Columns
cols_to_include = [c for c in df.columns if c not in ["NewHashDiff","OldHashDiff","NewHashKey","OldHashKey"]]
df_with_necessary_cols = df.select(*cols_to_include)
